# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-04-29 | **更新时间**: 07:14 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[22:54]` **复星医药公布2026年一季度业绩：扣除非经常性损益后归属于股东的净利润同比增长21.96%，管道执行力强劲**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Fosun Pharma Announces Q1 2026 Results: Net Profit Attributable to Shareholders After Deducting Non-Recurring Gains and Losses Increased by 21.96% YoY, With Strong Pipeline Execution* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | Orca Bio 宣布 Orca-Q 获得美国 FDA 再生医学先进疗法 (RMAT) 指定，用于治疗高风险血液恶性肿瘤**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Orca Bio Announces U.S. FDA Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy (RMAT) Designation Granted to Orca-Q for the Treatment of High-Risk Hematologic Malignancies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:02]` **iECURE 将在 ASGCT 和 SIMD 年会上展示 ECUR-506 治疗新生儿鸟氨酸转氨甲酰酶缺乏症的 OTC-HOPE 试验的初步临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *iECURE to Present Preliminary Clinical Data from Ongoing OTC-HOPE Trial of ECUR-506 in Neonatal-Onset Ornithine Transcarbamylase Deficiency at the ASGCT and SIMD Annual Meetings* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Genezen 和 Charlotte & Gwenyth Gray 基金会宣布为 CLN6 基因治疗临床试验建立生产合作伙伴关系**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Genezen and The Charlotte & Gwenyth Gray Foundation to Cure Batten Disease Announce Manufacturing Partnership for CLN6 Gene Therapy Clinical Trial* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **Genprex 合作者将在 2026 年美国基因与细胞治疗学会年会上展示 2 型糖尿病基因治疗的积极临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Genprex Collaborators to Present Positive Preclinical Data on Diabetes Gene Therapy for Type 2 Diabetes at the 2026 American Society of Gene and Cell Therapy Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **AIRNA 将在 ASGCT 年会上展示 RNA 编辑治疗管线的新临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AIRNA to Present New Preclinical Data on RNA-Editing Therapeutic Pipeline at ASGCT Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[23:30]` **吸取了“教训”，随着下一代 CAR-T 决策的临近，Kite 准备立即行动**

  <br><small>🇬🇧 *FinancialContent - EUDA Highlights Shenzhen Inno’s Approval Under Shenzhen Key Industry R&D Program for TCR-T Cell Therapy Development* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
